productDisplayName: Park Avenue Men White Boxer Briefs
description: Style NoteOne of the largest menswear Brands in India, park avenue is known for their unflinching dedication towards quality and Fit. Made from premium combed cotton and elastane fabric, this pair of boxer-briefs lives up to the brand's ideals. Its stylish waistband and blended composition give you a body enhancing fit. Product DetailsWhite seamless trunks, elasticized waistband with branding for a smooth and comfortable grip, maximum coverage, tag less abrasion-free comfort, a hint of stretch in fabric provides extra supportMaterial and Care80% cotton, 15% polyamide and 5% elastaneMachine wash warmDo not ironSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M
